title: Vandrayk (disambiguation)
content:
'''Vandrayk''' may refer to:

==[[Canon]]==
*The '''[[Vandrayk Scale]]''', a measurement scale relating to [[exogorth]]s and [[asteroid]]s

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''[[Gorman Vandrayk]]''', an [[Arkanian Offshoot/Legends|Arkanian Offshoot]] [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]]
*The '''[[Vandrayk Generator]]''', a theorized machine proposed by Vandrayk
*'''[[Vandrayk's Tuning Apparatus]]''', a piece of technology designed by Vandrayk

{{Disambig}}
